notes: OCHA reported that a baby daughter was among those killed in the Al Mawasi airstrike; no name was provided.
OCHA reported that a mother was killed in the Al Mawasi airstrike; no name was provided.

verification_status: OCHA reported that a 17-year-old girl was killed on her way to sit for a high school exam; no name was provided.
